nasb.text: and four carts and eight oxen he gave to the sons of Merari, according to their service, under the direction of Ithamar the son of Aaron the priest.

esv.text: And four wagons and eight oxen he gave to the sons of Merari, according to their service, under the direction of Ithamar the son of Aaron the priest.

cnv.text: 又按著米拉利子孫所辦的事務，把四輛車和八頭牛交給他們；他們都受亞倫祭司的兒子以他瑪的管理；

ccb.text: 分给米拉利的子孙四辆车和八头牛。他们都在祭司亚伦的儿子以他玛的领导下任职。
